topics.topic_ar: مشكلة البائع المتجول باستخدام البحث الشامل
topics.query_en: Traveling Salesman Problem TSP exhaustive search brute force algorithm tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية مشكلة البائع المتجول TSP بالعربي
topics.reason: Generating and evaluating all possible permutations with an O(n!) time complexity makes it conceptually overwhelming for students to trace.

topics.topic_ar: مشكلة حقيبة الظهر باستخدام البحث الشامل
topics.query_en: 0/1 Knapsack problem exhaustive search brute force explanation
topics.query_ar: شرح مشكلة حقيبة الظهر Knapsack problem خوارزميات بالعربي
topics.reason: Students struggle with the mathematical concept of generating a power set (all possible subsets) to find the optimal combination of items.

topics.query_en: Assignment problem exhaustive search algorithm brute force
topics.query_ar: شرح مشكلة التخصيص Assignment problem خوارزميات
topics.reason: Mapping jobs to workers requires understanding cost matrices and evaluating n! permutations, which is difficult to visualize and implement.

topics.query_en: Depth First Search DFS graph traversal algorithm explained with recursion
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية البحث في العمق DFS بالعربي
topics.reason: The recursive nature of DFS and the implicit use of the call stack to backtrack through complex graph structures often confuses beginners.

topics.topic_ar: مشكلة أقرب زوج من النقاط (القوة الغاشمة)
topics.query_en: Closest pair of points problem brute force algorithm tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية أقرب نقطتين Closest Pair بالعربي
topics.reason: Calculating Euclidean distances between all pairs of points in a 2D plane requires nested loops and careful index management to avoid redundant checks.
